𝗜𝗚𝗚𝗧_𝗢𝗙𝗙𝗜𝗖𝗜𝗔𝗟 | Semantic 3D reconstruction from images, enabling instance-level understanding of geometric structures.  🔥 Super Hot!

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Semantic 3D reconstruction from images, enabling instance-level understanding of geometric structures.
📅 Created: Oct 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Instance-grounded 3D feature learning
✅ Geometry-aware transformer architecture
✅ State-of-the-art performance on ScanNet and InsScene-15K
✅ Efficient inference with multi-view consistency


⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 369 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 18 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 18 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

IGGT is a Python-based framework for semantic 3D reconstruction, utilizing an Instance-Grounded Geometry Transformer to learn 3D features grounded in instance-level understanding. It achieves state-of-the-art performance on benchmarks like ScanNet and InsScene-15K with efficient inference.

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

𝗝𝗢𝗟𝗧 | Monitoring and managing battery and energy consumption on macOS and Linux systems through a terminal interface.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Monitoring and managing battery and energy consumption on macOS and Linux systems through a terminal interface.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Battery Status (Charge percentage, time remaining, health, cycle count)
✅ Power Monitoring (System power draw with CPU/GPU breakdown)
✅ Process Tracking (Processes sorted by energy impact)
✅ Historical Graphs
✅ Themes
✅ Background Daemon
✅ Process Management (Kill processes)


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 418 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 10 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 6 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Jolt is a terminal-based battery and energy monitor for macOS and Linux. It provides real-time insights into power consumption, process energy usage, and battery health, with features like historical graphs and a background daemon for data collection.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

OpenChatBI is an open-source, AI-powered business intelligence tool that allows users to query, analyze, and visualize data through natural language conversations. It leverages LangGraph and LangChain to build intelligent chat agents capable of converting natural language to SQL and performing complex data analysis.

𝗣𝗔𝗜𝗥𝗧𝗥𝗔𝗡𝗦𝗟𝗔𝗧𝗘 | To provide users with an integrated, side-by-side translation of web page content directly within their browser, enabling seamless understanding of foreign language websites.  🔥 Super Hot!

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide users with an integrated, side-by-side translation of web page content directly within their browser, enabling seamless understanding of foreign language websites.
📅 Created: Oct 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Appends translated text to original text for side-by-side viewing
✅ Supports major translation platforms (Google Translate, Bing, DeepL)
✅ Integrates with LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini)
✅ Open-source and privacy-focused (local processing, no data collection)
✅ Browser extension for Chrome, Firefox, and Edge


⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Pair Translate is a browser extension that provides an immersive translation experience by appending translated text directly to the original web content. It allows users to view both the original and translated versions side-by-side, enhancing comprehension and accessibility for multilingual web browsing.

𝗫𝗟𝗘𝗔𝗞 | Viewing and interacting with Excel spreadsheets directly within the terminal, without needing to open a full spreadsheet application.  🔥 Super Hot!

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Viewing and interacting with Excel spreadsheets directly within the terminal, without needing to open a full spreadsheet application.
📅 Created: Nov 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Beautiful terminal rendering with formatted tables
✅ Interactive TUI mode with keyboard navigation
✅ Smart data type handling
✅ Multi-sheet and Excel Table support
✅ Multiple export formats (CSV, JSON, plain text)
✅ Fast Excel parsing with `calamine`
✅ Support for multiple file formats (.xlsx, .xls, .xlsm, .xlsb, .ods)
✅ Full-text search
✅ Clipboard support
✅ Formula display
✅ Jump to row/column
✅ Lazy loading for large files


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 53 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 6 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

xleak is a fast terminal-based Excel viewer built with Rust and ratatui. It provides an interactive TUI for navigating and searching through spreadsheet data, supporting various Excel and OpenDocument formats, and offering features like lazy loading for large files and data export.

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦
